en_title: Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced Director Reveals Why Ubisoft Ditched Edward's Hidden Blade Combat
cn_title: 育碧《刺客信条：黑旗 记忆重置》导演解释为何取消袖剑战斗
subtitle: 先把核心战斗做好
opus_summary: 导演Richard Knight表示，多武器击杀动画的重制成本过高，因此《刺客信条：黑旗 记忆重置》优先采用双弯刀核心战斗，但团队仍在听取玩家意见。

paragraphs.en: Richard Knight, director of Assassin’s Creed Black Flag Resynced , explained why Edward Kenway is missing some of his most beloved fighting moves — and why fans shouldn’t lose hope that they’ll never come back.
paragraphs.cn: 《刺客信条：黑旗 记忆重置》导演Richard Knight解释了为何爱德华·肯威缺少一些深受喜爱的战斗招式，并表示粉丝不必彻底放弃这些动作回归的希望。

paragraphs.en: Black Flag Resynced features a whole host of differences from its predecessor, the most glaring of which are combat-related. For instance, Resynced gave enemies visible health bars and a defense bar, which players need to break before they can deal any damage.
paragraphs.cn: 《黑旗 记忆重置》与原作存在大量差异，其中最明显的是战斗。例如，敌人现在会显示生命条和防御条，玩家必须先击破防御才能造成伤害。

paragraphs.en: Resynced reworked the OG’s counter chain-kill system, which allowed players to breeze through groups of enemies with almost hilarious ease — not to mention the huge host of weapons, including muskets and hidden daggers, that players could choose from to end their opponents in endlessly creative ways.
paragraphs.cn: 重制版改写了原作的反击连杀系统。旧系统能让玩家轻松得近乎滑稽地扫清成群敌人，还提供火枪、袖剑等大量武器，让玩家以各种富有创意的方式解决对手。

paragraphs.en: Speaking with YouTuber JorRaptor , Knight explained why the team eschewed this style in favor of dual cutlasses, saying all those extra animation flourishes for so many different weapons and kills were simply lower on their priority list.
paragraphs.cn: Knight接受YouTuber JorRaptor采访时解释，团队为何放弃这种风格，改以双弯刀为核心：为大量不同武器和击杀制作额外动画，在优先级列表上相对靠后。

paragraphs.en: "During development, if you looked at Edward — he's so powerful right now and has so many tools, and so we prioritized core combat because we needed to nail that,” he said.
paragraphs.cn: 他说：「开发期间，如果看看爱德华——他现在太强了，工具也太多，因此我们优先做好核心战斗，因为必须把它打磨到位。」

paragraphs.en: "Something like throwing weapons, while it's cool, it's just like, ‘He already has ten ways to kill somebody.’ So, given the cost to reinvent the feature and rebuild it from the ground up with today's characters, rigs, and animations, there's a lot more that goes into it. It was just lower-priority for us."
paragraphs.cn: 「投掷武器确实很酷，但他已经有十种杀人方式。考虑到用今天的角色、骨骼和动画从头重新设计、重建功能的成本，背后涉及的工作多得多，所以对我们而言优先级较低。」

paragraphs.en: That being said, King assured the community that they’re paying attention to feedback.
paragraphs.cn: 不过，Knight向社区保证，团队正在关注反馈。

paragraphs.en: "We can't make any promises [but] we're listening to the community. We're interested in what people want the most.”
paragraphs.cn: 他说：「我们无法作出任何承诺，但我们在听取社区意见，也想知道大家最希望看到什么。」

paragraphs.en: Black Flag Resynced was met with high praise from fans and has proved an extremely profitable venture for Ubisoft, with its day-one DLC earning $1 million on Steam , alone on the back of two million copies sold on the first day alone.
paragraphs.cn: 《黑旗 记忆重置》获得粉丝高度评价，也为育碧带来丰厚利润。游戏首日售出200万份，其首发DLC仅在Steam就赚得100万美元(约合人民币677万元)。

translated_terms.Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced: 《刺客信条：黑旗 记忆重置》
